name: clodex
description: Autonomous development loop: plan, ship, run codex adversarial-review, and iterate on findings until approved or threshold/iteration cap is reached. v0.3.0 reframes Hard Rules 1 and 2 to separate review-tool identity (immutable) from invocation mechanics (flexible per documented recovery contract); paired with HARD_RULES.md v0.3 positive contract. PowerShell preferred shell on Windows for adversarial-review launch + cancel (bypasses MSYS /PID mangling bug + IPC pipe wedge pattern in upstream codex-companion). New Phase 0.6 auto-clears orphaned state-file records via PowerShell cancel before --continue safety check fires. Phase 4c stall recovery now retries up to 3 times per iteration with exponential backoff (30s/60s/120s) before escalating to codex-reproducible-hang. v0.2.9 lifted --version/--help into commands/clodex.md. v0.2.8 added broker wedge auto-recovery. v0.2.7 added iter-NNN-stalled.md breadcrumbs + ~3-min stall detection. v0.2.6 added per-iteration iter-NNN-review.md. v0.2.5 externalized hard rules. v0.2.4 normalized .clodex/ disk layout. v0.2.1 adapted to codex plugin v1.0.4's disable-model-invocation. v0.2 baseline: hard rules, --continue flag.
